name: Bul Kogi (Korean Barbecue)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef short ribs in a bowl.
2. Add garlic, sesame seeds, green onions, pepper, sesame oil, soy sauce, sugar, and oil to the bowl. Toss everything together well to coat the meat evenly.
3. Cover the bowl and let the mixture stand at room temperature for 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
4. Grill over coals or broil under high heat, turning and basting often with the marinade until the meat is tender.
